definition: Manufactures equipment that generates, converts, stores, switches, protects, or distributes electrical power aboard the ship or in supporting systems.
conditional_naics: 335999 only with corroboration; 335931-335932 are normally electronic interconnects (09)
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: Manufacturer of Goods; PSC 6110/6120/6130/6140/6150/6210; name terms motor, generator, transformer, switchgear, power supply, battery.

definition: Builds or services prime movers and mechanical-drive components: engines, turbines, reduction gears, bearings, shafts, couplings, brakes, and propulsion-unit parts.
conditional_naics: 336390 and broad aerospace/transportation codes only after process review
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 2810/2825/2835/2895/2910-2995/3010-3040/3110-3130; name terms engine, turbine, propulsion, gear, bearing, drive, shaft.

definition: Produces fluid-handling equipment and metallic piping components: pumps, compressors, valves, actuators, fabricated pipe, and fittings.
conditional_naics: Plastic/rubber pipe, hose, seals, and gaskets remain in materials/process category 08 unless entity evidence shows system integration.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 4310/4320/4720/4730/4810/4820; name terms pump, valve, compressor, actuator, pipe, tube, fitting, fluid power.

definition: Makes heat-transfer, steam/boiler, refrigeration, heating, ventilation, air-purification, and environmental-control equipment.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 4110/4120/4130/4140/4420/4460/4520; name terms heat exchanger, boiler, HVAC, refrigeration, chiller, fan, blower, ventilation.

definition: Performs heavy plate, structural, sheet-metal, enclosure, tank, container, and module fabrication, including welded ship structures.
conditional_naics: 332999 and end-market codes such as 336992 require specific secondary process evidence; 336611 maps here only when the supplier is a fabricator rather than a shipyard/integrator.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: Manufacturer of Goods; PSC 5410/5430/5450/5670; name terms fabrication, structural, plate, weldment, module, tank, enclosure.

definition: Melts, refines, rolls, draws, extrudes, forges, or casts ferrous and nonferrous metals and supplies mill forms or near-net-shape metal products.
conditional_naics: Metal service centers are distribution (16) unless the UEI is clearly the producing mill/forge/foundry.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 9510-9660; name terms steel, alloy, mill, forge, foundry, casting, aluminum, copper, titanium.

definition: Performs machining, turning, forming, heat treatment, plating/coating, or manufactures small precision metal parts, fasteners, springs, and hardware.
conditional_naics: 332999 only with machining/finishing evidence; structural plate and sheet fabrication remains in 05.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 5305-5365; name terms machine, machining, precision, fastener, bolt, spring, heat treat, plating, anodizing, coating.

definition: Produces chemicals and nonmetallic engineered materials or parts using compounding, molding, laminating, coating, rubber, plastics, glass/mineral, sealing, and composite processes.
conditional_naics: If a company primarily integrates completed hose/pipe systems, use 03; if it sells rather than manufactures materials, use 16.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 6810-6850/8010-8040/9320-9390; name terms rubber, plastics, resin, composite, gasket, seal, foam, adhesive, coating, chemical.

definition: Makes electronic parts and assemblies, computing hardware, printed circuits, semiconductors, passive components, connectors, wiring devices, and fiber/electrical cable.
conditional_naics: 335999 requires corroboration; system-level instruments and communications equipment belong in 10.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 5810/5905-5999/6010-6099/6145/6150; name terms electronics, circuit, semiconductor, connector, cable, wire, fiber optic, computer.

definition: Builds system-level sensing, navigation, measurement, test, process-control, radar/sonar, communications, and audio/video equipment.
conditional_naics: 334512 is environmental/HVAC control (04); 335314 power-control apparatus is 01.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 5805-5895/6620-6695; name terms sensor, instrument, radar, sonar, navigation, control, communications, telemetry, test.

definition: Manufactures production equipment, machine tools, jigs/fixtures, welding equipment, cranes/hoists/conveyors, industrial vehicles, and other plant machinery.
conditional_naics: 333998-333999 and generic transportation-equipment codes require secondary/process evidence.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 3410-3695/3910-3990; name terms machinery, machine tool, tooling, fixture, die, crane, hoist, conveyor, welding.

definition: Produces ammunition, explosives, weapons, launch/handling equipment, and other mission hardware whose defining capability is weapons-system manufacture.
conditional_naics: 336414; 336419; 336992; 336999 only after review of specific secondary NAICS/PSC/name; process-specific codes override.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 10xx/12xx/13xx/14xx; name terms ordnance, ammunition, weapon, launcher, missile, torpedo, combat system.

definition: Performs whole-ship or major marine-system integration, shipyard construction/repair, large-scale outfitting, or marine-module integration rather than a discrete component process.
direct_naics: 336611; 336612, but both are review-trigger codes in this supplier dataset
conditional_naics: A specific secondary process code (forging, structural fabrication, valves, heat exchangers, etc.) overrides 336611/336612 for component suppliers.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 19xx/20xx; name terms shipyard, shipbuilding, marine integration, outfitting, joiner; evidence of whole-ship/major module work.

definition: Provides technical design, engineering, software/data, systems integration, scientific R&D, laboratory testing, surveying, or specialized technical consulting as its operating capability.
conditional_naics: 541330 and 541990 are review triggers when manufacturing codes are also present; manufacturing process evidence overrides service coding.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC Dxxx/R4xx/ADxx; business type/service evidence; name terms engineering, software, systems, research, laboratory, test, design.

definition: Installs, constructs, repairs, maintains, remediates, or services equipment/facilities rather than manufacturing the equipment.
conditional_naics: Primary contractor/repair NAICS generally governs even when the full NAICS list also contains product codes, unless a curated entity review proves manufacturing is dominant.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC Jxxx/Kxxx/Zxxx; name terms contractor, installation, repair, maintenance, service, remediation, overhaul.

definition: Supplies products through wholesale/retail channels or provides transportation, warehousing, freight, rental/leasing, packaging, or commercial supply-chain services.
conditional_naics: A Manufacturer of Goods flag alone does not override a clear primary wholesale/logistics code; require operating-entity evidence.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: Business-model terms distributor, supply, wholesaler, logistics, freight, warehouse, rental, leasing, dealer.

definition: Provides nontechnical management/administrative, staffing, security, training, utility, financial, healthcare, association, or other support services.
conditional_naics: 561990 and 551112 are broad review codes; technical design/R&D/testing goes to 14, repair/facility trade work to 15, logistics to 16.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: Business/service descriptors; name terms staffing, consulting, training, security, association, utility, administrative support.

category: Interiors, safety gear & miscellaneous manufactured products
definition: Manufactures shipboard interiors, furniture/millwork, wood/paper/packaging products, apparel/safety goods, signs, and miscellaneous finished products not captured above.
conditional_naics: 339999 is too broad and remains unresolved unless secondary codes, PSC, or entity evidence identify the product/process.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: PSC 55xx/71xx/81xx/83xx/84xx; name terms furniture, joiner, cabinet, millwork, canvas, apparel, safety, sign, packaging.

definition: Temporary analytical residual for entities lacking enough reliable evidence to assign a work capability without invention. Still gives every UEI exactly one label.
direct_naics: No primary NAICS; or only weak/generic/end-market codes: 332999, 333998, 333999, 335999, 339999, selected 336xxx, with no corroborating evidence
conditional_naics: Resolve through curated review using specific secondary NAICS, PSC, entity name, operating subsidiary, owner context, and authoritative external evidence for high-dollar suppliers.
entity_attribute_tiebreakers: Use confidence U until resolved; foreign/unregistered status routes review but never determines work type.
